# Git Commit Instructions

When making a commit, please follow these guidelines to ensure clear and consistent commit messages:
- Use this mask: `type(scope): subject`
- `type` can be one of the following:
  - `feat`: A new feature
  - `fix`: A bug fix
  - `docs`: Documentation changes
  - `style`: Code style changes (formatting, missing semi-colons, etc.)
  - `refactor`: Code changes that neither fix a bug nor add a feature
- `scope` Branch name
- `subject` A brief description of the change (max 100 characters)
